title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail Capital India:
Future Retail Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail Capital India!
